info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

201.description: Returns information about a successfully created space.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/space \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"name":"string"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"name\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/space", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/space \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/space", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request DELETE \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/space/%7BspaceId%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("DELETE", "/api/space/%7BspaceId%7D", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/space/%7BspaceId%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

conn.request("GET", "/api/space/authentication/providers", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/space/%7BspaceId%7D/domain-verification \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/space/%7BspaceId%7D/domain-verification", headers=headers)

curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/space/%7BspaceId%7D/domain-verification \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"domain":"string","verifyCode":"string"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"domain\":\"string\",\"verifyCode\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/space/%7BspaceId%7D/domain-verification", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))
